name: pnas-skills
description: An opinionated agent skill stack for manuscripts targeted at PNAS (Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences), the broad-coverage multidisciplinary journal of the U.S. National Academy of Sciences.

plugins.name: pnas-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the PNAS manuscript lifecycle: workflow router, scope/significance fit, submission-track selection (Direct vs Contributed), the ≤120-word Significance Statement, ≤250-word abstract, main-text writing with in-text Materials and Methods + classification, display items, statistics & reproducibility, data/code availability, numbered reference style, submission preflight, and reviewer rebuttal.
